meaning: n.基督的敌人,反对基督者
examples: Substantial Numbers of Americans believe Obama is the Antichrist.
Maybe he's thinking that this will be another Messiah, a false Messiah of sorts,that is,the antichrist.
However, I was struck with the same flash of clarity as St Paul on the road to Damascus as I suddenly realised who, or what, the Antichrist is.
He is the personification of evil, the antichrist of Christian eschatology, the sort of monster who, 800 years ago, inspired 30, 000 kids to leave home and set sail to Jerusalem.
